annotatedManual.description: Wildcard origin policy allows credentialed cross-origin abuse.
annotatedManual.evidence: Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *
annotatedManual.mitigation: Restrict CORS to explicit trusted origins.

annotatedManual.description: Token validation path accepts manipulated JWT payloads.
annotatedManual.evidence: Tampered JWT accepted by auth endpoint.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Verify signature, issuer and audience on every request.

annotatedManual.description: Session identifier is reused after login.
annotatedManual.evidence: Same session ID before/after authentication.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Rotate session ID on successful authentication.

annotatedManual.description: Trust in client-supplied identity headers allows impersonation.
annotatedManual.evidence: X-User header consumed without signature or gateway verification.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Accept identity only from signed tokens or trusted proxy headers.

annotatedManual.description: Dynamic SQL composition permits query manipulation.
annotatedManual.evidence: Injected payload changes authentication result.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Use prepared statements and strict input validation.

annotatedManual.description: Reflected payload executes in browser context.
annotatedManual.evidence: Injected script appears unsanitized in response body.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Encode output and sanitize all user-controlled input.

annotatedManual.description: Path traversal allows modification or unauthorized file access workflow.
annotatedManual.evidence: ../ sequences reach protected paths.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Canonicalize path and enforce allow-list constraints.

annotatedManual.description: Runtime configuration values can be overridden from untrusted inputs.
annotatedManual.evidence: Unsafe merge of request payload into config object.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Lock configuration keys and validate update channels.

annotatedManual.description: Critical actions can execute without auditable event trail.
annotatedManual.evidence: Authentication and admin flows emit incomplete logs.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Emit structured immutable logs for security-relevant events.

annotatedManual.description: No user-bound correlation ID is attached to sensitive actions.
annotatedManual.evidence: Write operations logged without actor identifier.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Attach signed actor + correlation IDs to all state changes.

annotatedManual.description: Logs can be altered post-write in current storage setup.
annotatedManual.evidence: Flat file logs writable by app process.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Use append-only centralized logging with integrity controls.

annotatedManual.description: Error message variance enables account enumeration.
annotatedManual.evidence: Different messages for valid vs invalid users.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Return uniform authentication failure responses.

annotatedManual.description: Missing security headers reveal attack surface and reduce browser hardening.
annotatedManual.evidence: Absent CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Set a hardened default security header profile.

annotatedManual.description: Sensitive values can leak through verbose diagnostics.
annotatedManual.evidence: Token fragments present in debug output.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Mask secrets in logs and disable verbose production traces.

annotatedManual.description: Login endpoint lacks adaptive throttling.
annotatedManual.evidence: High-volume attempts accepted without progressive delay.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Apply per-user and per-IP rate limiting plus lockout.

annotatedManual.description: Unbounded request payload processing can exhaust memory.
annotatedManual.evidence: Large payload path has no early limit checks.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Enforce body size limits and streaming guards.

annotatedManual.description: Expensive endpoint can be abused for compute starvation.
annotatedManual.evidence: No queue or circuit-breaker around costly operation.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Introduce circuit breaker and bounded worker pool.

annotatedManual.description: Weak credentials allow rapid compromise of accounts.
annotatedManual.evidence: Passwords like 123456 are accepted.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Enforce strong password policy and breach password blocklist.

annotatedManual.description: Role assignment path allows user-controlled privilege value.
annotatedManual.evidence: Client role field reaches persistence layer unsafely.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Server-side enforce role mapping independent of client input.

annotatedManual.description: Admin actions are missing explicit authorization guard in one flow.
annotatedManual.evidence: Endpoint reachable with authenticated non-admin account.
annotatedManual.mitigation: Add RBAC checks in middleware and endpoint handler.
